basics.name: Nikita Singh
basics.title: Data Analyst
basics.summary: I’m an entry-level professional with hands-on experience in data analysis and web development through internships. I enjoy working with data, solving problems, and finding patterns, and I’ve gained practical exposure to real-world systems and workflows.

bullets: Analyzed cyber fraud data to support investigations.
Performed data cleaning, analysis, and reporting to improve data accuracy.
Assisted in account tracking and identified suspicious transaction patterns.
Managed inventory, orders, & manpower data while maintaining daily records.
Improved data organization for faster access & coordinated with workers and suppliers for smooth operations.

projects.title: Customer Purchase Behavior Analysis
bullets: Analyzed sales data to identify customer trends and purchasing patterns
Created visualizations to support data-driven insights

projects.title: Twitter Sentiment Analysis
bullets: Built a Python-based model to classify text sentiment
Analysed data using basic NLP techniques

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science / Bachelor of Technology, Computer science

education.institution: Modern Hind Convent School, Mewat (Nuh), Haryana

certifications: Rajasthan State Certificate in Information Technology - Vardhman Mahaveer Open University, Kota
